hero.heading: Eat well in Burbank.
hero.subheading: A neighborhood restaurant with a seasonally-driven menu — bold, modern, never fussy.

about.heading: A neighborhood restaurant, done right.
paragraphs: ZONO is what happens when great cooking meets a great room. Honest ingredients, careful technique, and a menu that changes when the season says it should.
We're on 1st Street in downtown Burbank — close enough to walk to, comfortable enough to stay the night, ambitious enough to surprise you.

services.title: Lunch
services.description: Bright, fast lunch plates — fresh salads, wood-fired flatbreads, and sandwiches built for a good break.

services.title: Dinner
services.description: Seasonally-driven mains with thoughtful sides. The menu rotates as the produce does.

services.title: Bar Menu
services.description: Craft cocktails, natural wines by the glass, and small plates designed to share.

services.title: Weekend Brunch
services.description: Saturday and Sunday — house pastries, egg dishes, and bottomless mimosas.

services.title: Private Dining
services.description: The back room seats 30 — birthdays, anniversaries, team dinners, holiday parties.

services.title: Tasting Menu
services.description: Chef's choice five-course experience Friday and Saturday evenings. Book 48 hours ahead.

reviews.name: Jennifer P.
reviews.text: Genuinely surprised by Burbank. Beautifully plated, attentive service, and the wine list is sharp. New favorite.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Took my parents here for their anniversary. Every course was thoughtful. The pastry chef deserves an award.

reviews.name: Lauren S.
reviews.text: The kind of place you take someone you want to impress. Modern, warm, and the food backs it up.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: ZONO Restaurant, 610 N 1st St, Burbank, CA

seo.title: ZONO — Modern Restaurant in Downtown Burbank, CA
seo.description: Seasonally-driven menu, craft cocktails, weekend brunch, and private dining in downtown Burbank. Reservations: (818) 557-1268.
